fields.name: Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of this project journal. You can enter a maximum of 10 characters, both numbers and letters.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of this journal.

fields.name: Reason Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the reason code, a supplementary source code that enables you to trace the entry.

fields.name: No. Series
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number series from which entry or record numbers are assigned to new entries or records.

fields.name: Posting No. Series
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the number series that will be used to assign document numbers to ledger entries that are posted from this journal batch. To see the number series that have been set up in the No. Series table, choose the field.

fields.name: No. of Lines
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of lines in this journal batch.
